title: cyperus perangustus
intro: Cyperus perangustus, also known as the Narrow-leaved Sedge, is a type of aquatic plant species in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus perangustus include relief from symptoms such as bloating, cramps, and diarrhea, making it a popular herbal remedy for gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
